agent_raw: Defense wins. The blocked random window evaluation is supported by empirical pre-analysis establishing near-zero residual autocorrelation at the 15-minute forecasting horizon after conditioning. The four-period comparison between blocked random and rolling-origin evaluation shows equivalent model rankings and near-identical MAPE. The evaluation design was pre-specified based on these checks. The claim is limited to the short-horizon retrained task where the empirical justification holds. The standard objection to non-chronological time-series evaluation does not apply when the conditioned residual process is empirically near-i.i.d. at the target horizon.
